philosophy.title: A Space for Harmony and Self-Development
philosophy.paragraph1: We create a space where life becomes brighter. Our mission is to make rest and self-care not an obligation, but a pleasure. KAIF is a place where you restore your strength, recharge your batteries and enjoy every moment.
philosophy.paragraph2: Everything here is designed so that you want to come back: workouts that inspire, relaxation that fills you up, and an atmosphere that gives you a real buzz. We believe that harmony is not a luxury, but a necessity, and we make it available to you.
philosophy.quote: Health is not just the absence of disease, but a state of complete physical, mental and social well-being
philosophy.imageAlt: KAIF - a space for harmony and self-development

Multifunctional
KAIF Complex
about.description1: KAIF PHUKET is a premium complex where you restore your strength, recharge your energy and enjoy every moment. Everything here is created so that you want to return: workouts that inspire, relaxation that fills, and an atmosphere that gives real pleasure.
about.description2: We have created a unique space in Phuket where premium service meets Thai hospitality. KAIF is not just a spa complex, it's a philosophy of healthy lifestyle and harmony.

what_includes.question: What does the KAIF complex include?
what_includes.answer: KAIF is a unique complex in Phuket where you can combine activity, relaxation and self-care in one place. The territory includes: modern gym, Olympic pool with relaxation zones, dance and functional training studio, martial arts hall, beauty studio, SPA with Russian sauna, Thai hammam and massage services, restaurant with Eastern cuisine, Russian classics and barbecue dishes.

working_hours.question: What are the complex's operating hours?
working_hours.answer: The whole complex is open daily from 07:00 to 21:00. Some zones (SPA, restaurant) may have separate schedules. We recommend checking the operating hours of specific services when booking.

how_to_book.question: How to book services?
how_to_book.answer: Booking is available through our website, mobile app, by phone +66 76 123 456 or WhatsApp. We recommend booking in advance, especially for SPA treatments and restaurant tables.

memberships.question: Can I purchase memberships?
memberships.answer: Yes! We have various memberships: daily, weekly, monthly and annual. Combined packages including multiple services with up to 30% discount are also available.

experience_needed.question: Is experience required for classes?
experience_needed.answer: No! We have programs for all fitness levels. Beginners get introductory briefings, personal consultations and "first steps" programs for safe workout start.

payment_methods.question: What payment methods are accepted?
payment_methods.answer: We accept Thai Baht payments: cash, card, or QR code.

support.title: Support Service
support.description: Our team is ready to help you during business hours. Contact us in any convenient way.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Chat
whatsapp.description: Quick responses in messenger. Booking, questions, support - all in one chat.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our SPA services and treatments

services.question: What SPA services do you offer?
services.answer: We offer a full range of SPA services: massage (Thai, oil, sports), cosmetology treatments, laser hair removal, manicure, pedicure, hair care, as well as sauna and hammam.

booking.question: How to book a SPA treatment?
booking.answer: You can book by phone +66 62 480 5877, via WhatsApp or in person at our center. We recommend booking in advance, especially for popular treatments.

policy.question: What are the cancellation rules?
policy.answer: Please notify us of cancellation at least 24 hours before the scheduled time. Cancellation less than 24 hours in advance may incur a 50% cancellation fee.

payment.question: What payment methods are accepted?
payment.answer: We accept cash (THB, USD, EUR), bank cards of all systems, as well as mobile payments. Payment is made after the treatment.

preparation.question: Do I need to bring anything with me?
preparation.answer: We provide everything you need: towels, robes, slippers and cosmetic products. You just need to come and relax.

gifts.question: Are there gift certificates?
gifts.answer: Yes! We offer gift certificates of various denominations for any SPA services. They can be purchased at our center or ordered by phone.

booking.title: Book a Treatment
booking.description: Book a SPA treatment or beauty service for complete relaxation

online.title: Online Booking
online.description: Convenient online booking for any treatment. Choose your specialist, time and service in just a few clicks. Instant booking confirmation.

phone.description: Contact us by phone for quick booking. Our consultants will help you choose the right treatment and time.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Chat
whatsapp.description: Message us on WhatsApp for convenient booking. We will respond quickly and help you choose the best time.

1.text: Amazing experience! The Thai massage was incredibly relaxing, and the atmosphere was simply magical. I will definitely come back again.
1.author: Anna Petrova
1.title: Regular Client

2.text: Professional masters, quality treatments and attention to detail. This is the best SPA center I've visited in Phuket.
2.author: Ekaterina Sidorova
2.title: Guest from Moscow

3.text: Wonderful place for rest and recovery. I especially loved the Finnish sauna and jacuzzi. Highly recommend to everyone!
3.author: Mikhail Volkov
3.title: KAIF Resident

gym.section_subtitle: Discover the world of fitness and sports at KAIF Sauna. Our modern services are designed to give you the opportunity to train with pleasure and reach new heights.

gym.description1: Spacious modern gym with cardio and strength equipment of high class. The gym is equipped with everything necessary for full-fledged training and maintaining physical fitness.
gym.description2: Guests have access to personal lockers, showers, as well as personal trainer services by appointment.

gym.title: Modern Gym
gym.short_description: Premium equipment from Technogym and Life Fitness for effective workouts
gym.description1: Our gym is equipped with modern premium equipment from leading manufacturers. Here you will find everything you need for effective workouts - from free weights to the latest generation of cardio machines.
gym.description2: The spacious room with panoramic windows creates the perfect atmosphere for training, and professional trainers are always ready to help create an individual program.

fight.title: Fight Club
fight.short_description: Professional ring and equipment for boxing, Muay Thai and Jiu-Jitsu
fight.description1: KAIF Fighting Club is a modern space for training in various martial arts. Professional ring, punching bags, heavy bags, and special flooring create ideal conditions for both beginners and experienced fighters.
fight.description2: Our trainers are experienced fighters and champions who will help you master techniques and achieve high results in your chosen martial art.

fight_club.description2: Our trainers are experienced fighters and champions who will help you master techniques and achieve high results in your chosen martial art.

intro.title: Children's Introductory Steaming
intro.subtitle: Light steam
intro.description: A short and sensitive ritual. The parmaster gently warms the back and legs with brooms. Only pleasant light steam and comfortable warmth

lady.title: Lady's Steaming
lady.subtitle: Low-temperature
lady.description: Special low-temperature technique with deep local warming. Ideal for first visits and deep relaxation

classic.title: Classic Steaming
classic.subtitle: Medium steam
classic.description: Steaming with oak brooms in one session. Thorough whole body steaming with aromatic steam

artesian.title: Artesian
artesian.subtitle: Contrast steaming
artesian.description: Intense warming with oak brooms enhanced by the contrast of cool mineral water. Bright bubbling sensation

gravity.title: Gravity
gravity.subtitle: Weightless steaming
gravity.description: Intense warming with transition to warm pool. Gentle floating creates a feeling of weightlessness

salt_fire.title: The Fire Starter
salt_fire.subtitle: Salt steaming
salt_fire.description: Intense warming with sea salt application and warming through a sheet. Salt cave effect

four_hands.title: Four-Hand Steaming
four_hands.subtitle: Synchronized steaming
four_hands.description: Two experienced steam masters work in perfect synchronization. Waves of heat, massage with brooms in unison and double attention

sports.title: Sports Steaming
sports.subtitle: With massage elements
sports.description: Intense warming to the depth of muscles, activating blood circulation. Then massage with brooms right on the shelf

warrior_path.title: Warrior's Path
warrior_path.subtitle: Contrast steaming
warrior_path.description: Steaming in two sessions with cold water dousing between them. Back warming with birch brooms

stalwar.title: Thor's Power
stalwar.subtitle: Intense steam
stalwar.description: Intense steam and contrast. The steam master works with high steam creating a dynamic wave of warmth. Post-workout feeling

honey.title: Honey Steaming
honey.subtitle: With natural honey
honey.description: Original steaming with Canadian brooms with honey application. Vitamins through open pores and summer meadow aroma

royal.title: Royal Steaming
royal.subtitle: Honey-salt scrub
royal.description: Royal ritual of deep warming and cleansing. Canadian brooms, natural honey and sea salt

valhalla.title: Valhalla
valhalla.subtitle: Group steaming
valhalla.description: A soft ritual for a group of 2-4 people. Steaming with fan and brooms, foot bath with herbal decoction

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most popular questions about our banya

panoramic.question: What's special about the panoramic banya?
panoramic.answer: Our banya is unique with several features: 150 square meters with panoramic jungle windows, built from Siberian cedar and Altai linden - premium natural materials. It's the only panoramic Russian banya in Phuket where you can enjoy traditional banya rituals with tropical nature views.

procedures.question: What procedures are included in the banya ritual?
procedures.answer: Depending on your chosen program you'll receive: classic banya ritual with birch brooms, aromatherapy with essential oils, herbal infusions and teas.

materials.question: What materials is the banya built from?
materials.answer: The banya is built exclusively from natural eco-friendly materials: Siberian cedar, Altai linden, Karelian birch. All finishes are natural, without chemical additives. Such materials create a special microclimate and provide natural aromatherapy.

brand.description: Premium wellness complex in Phuket. We create a unique wellness experience to restore harmony of body and soul.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern the provision of services by the KAIF wellness complex on Phuket Island, Thailand.

general.title: 1. General Provisions
general.content: By using our services, you agree to these terms. KAIF provides SPA, fitness, restaurant and Russian banya services.

booking.title: 2. Booking and Cancellation
booking.content: Service booking is done by phone or via WhatsApp. Cancellation is possible no later than 24 hours before the scheduled time.

rules.title: 3. Visiting Rules
rules.content: Visitors must observe hygiene and safety rules. The administration reserves the right to refuse service for violations of established rules.

liability.title: 4. Liability
liability.content: KAIF is not responsible for visitors' personal belongings. All procedures are performed by qualified specialists in compliance with international safety standards.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of users of the KAIF wellness complex.

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.content: We collect only the information necessary to provide quality services: name, contact information, service preferences.

usage.title: 2. Information Usage
usage.content: Your data is used exclusively for procedure booking, informing about new services and improving service quality.

protection.title: 3. Data Protection
protection.content: We apply modern information protection methods and do not transfer personal data to third parties without your consent.

contacts.title: 4. Contacts
contacts.content: For questions about personal data processing contact:

items.ya_bao: White Kidney Tea from Yunnan (Ya Bao)
items.ya_bao_desc: Harvested from ancient tea trees over 100 years old in Yunnan province. Soft, fresh and ideal for relaxation
items.tie_guan_yin_desc: Famous light oolong from Southern Fujian with a delicate floral taste. Refreshes body and mind
items.da_hong_pao_desc: Mineral-rich oolong from Wuishan with woody and tobacco notes. Sweet, complex aftertaste
items.gaba_oolong_desc: Rich in catechins and vitamin C. Refreshing and energizing tea
items.milk_oolong_desc: Intriguing tea combinations with rich aromas
items.shu_puerh_desc: Rich pu-erh with woody and nutty notes. Slightly viscous, for lovers of strong tea
items.herbal_tea_desc: Aromatic herbal blend with mint, thyme and oregano. Refreshing, restorative and ideal after sauna
items.buckwheat_tea_desc: Natural sweet buckwheat tea. Caffeine-free, soothing and good for children
items.ivan_tea_desc: Traditional Russian herbal tea with a delicate floral-herbal taste and light honey-fruit aroma. Caffeine-free
items.protein_desc: Protein / Almond Milk / Milk / Coconut Water
